memory:memory/2026-04-05.md:1:28.snippet: # 2026-04-05 ## Durable session outcomes - Implemented and shipped major backend hardening work in `pms-master` (tenant_portal_backend), pushing directly to `main` across many incremental commits. ### Payments / accounting boundary delivered - Added operational ledger foundation: - `LedgerAccount` + `LedgerTransaction` models and migrations. - Posting hooks for invoice charges, payments, manual charges/payments, and reversal entries. - Added APIs: - `GET /payments/ledger/accounts/:leaseId` - `GET /payments/delinquency/queue` with pagination (`limit/offset`) and sorting (`daysPastDue`, `amountDueCents`, `tenantName`, `priorityScore`). - Added delinquency `priorityScore` plus config
